title: Secure and govern Unity Catalog objects in Azure Databricks
summary: Learn to implement comprehensive security and governance for your data assets in Azure Databricks using Unity Catalog. Master access control strategies, fine-grained permissions, credential management, and governance practices to build a secure and compliant data platform.

sections.title: Secure and govern Unity Catalog objects in Azure Databricks
sections.summary: Learn to implement comprehensive security and governance for your data assets in Azure Databricks using Unity Catalog. Master access control strategies, fine-grained permissions, credential management, and governance practices to build a secure and compliant data platform.

lessons.title: Secure Unity Catalog objects
lessons.content_md:
Learn how to implement comprehensive security for Unity Catalog objects in Azure Databricks, including access control, fine-grained permissions, credential management, and authentication strategies.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/secure-unity-catalog-objects/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

lessons.title: Govern Unity Catalog objects
lessons.content_md:
Learn how to govern data and AI assets in Azure Databricks using Unity Catalog, including access control, data lineage, audit logging, and secure sharing.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/govern-unity-catalog-objects/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica Secure and govern Unity Catalog objects in Azure Databricks
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **Secure and govern Unity Catalog objects in Azure Databricks**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
